workflow.desc: Frontend Code Review - Reviews web frontend implementation against design documents

field.name: design_doc_path
field.desc: Path to frontend module design document

field.name: source_root
field.desc: Root directory of frontend source code

block.field: NEVER modify source code files - read-only operation
Do NOT attempt to fix issues - only document them
PARTIAL/FAIL results MUST include specific Re-dispatch Guidance
Skip items already marked as passed in previous review
Verify all required parameters provided
Report error and stop
- Module Overview - Component Structure - Store Modules - Routes - API Integration points
Completed Files, Implementation Status, Known Issues
API contract not provided - skipping API validation

- Components: components/**/*.vue or **/*.tsx (e.g., components/UserForm.vue) - Views/Pages: views/**/*.vue or pages/**/*.tsx (e.g., views/UserList.vue) - Store: store/**/*.ts or stores/**/*.ts (e.g., store/userStore.ts) - API Clients: api/**/*.ts or services/**/*.ts (e.g., api/userApi.ts) - Routes: router/**/*.ts (e.g., router/index.ts) - Styles: styles/**/*.scss or **/*.module.css (e.g., styles/variables.scss)
Use Glob to scan for implemented files
Generate completeness matrix and percentage

- Directory Structure: Components in correct directories per design - Severity: ERROR - Component Granularity: Components appropriately sized and reusable - Severity: WARN - Naming Convention: PascalCase for components, camelCase for composables - Severity: ERROR - Props Definition: Props properly typed and documented - Severity: WARN

- Store Design: Store modules match design specification - Severity: ERROR - Data Flow: Unidirectional data flow followed - Severity: WARN - State Mutations: Mutations/actions properly defined - Severity: ERROR
- Endpoint Match: API calls match API contract - Severity: ERROR - Error Handling: API errors properly handled - Severity: ERROR - Loading States: Loading states implemented - Severity: WARN

- Route Match: Routes match design document - Severity: ERROR - Lazy Loading: Routes use lazy loading where appropriate - Severity: WARN - Navigation Guards: Auth guards implemented where required - Severity: ERROR
- Style Guide: Follows project style guide - Severity: WARN - Responsive: Responsive design implemented - Severity: ERROR - Accessibility: Basic accessibility (a11y) compliance - Severity: WARN
- PASS: 100% files created, 0 ERROR-level issues - PARTIAL: 70-99% files created, or non-critical ERROR issues - FAIL: <70% files created, or critical blockers present
templates/REVIEW-REPORT-TEMPLATE.md
speccrew-workspace/iterations/{number}-{type}-{name}/04.development/{platform_id}/[module]-review-report.md
